omitted_declarations.policy_reference:
AAWireless processes your personal data because you make use of the (sales) services of AAWireless or you have provided these data to AAWireless yourself. Below you will find an overview of the personal data that AAWireless processes:

– First and last name
– Address details
– Phone number
– E-mail address
– IP address
– Other personal data that you provide to us, for example by creating a profile on www.aawireless.io
